atDirectives.name: @layer exsa.tokens
atDirectives.description: EXSA Layer 1 — Design tokens (:root custom properties)

atDirectives.name: @layer exsa.reset
atDirectives.description: EXSA Layer 2 — Box model, focus, scrollbar, RTL, body defaults

atDirectives.name: @layer exsa.layout
atDirectives.description: EXSA Layer 3 — Flex, grid, containers, breakpoints

atDirectives.name: @layer exsa.elements
atDirectives.description: EXSA Layer 4 — Classless element styles for nav, table, form, button, blockquote, dialog, and more (opt-in via .exsa)

atDirectives.name: @layer exsa.components
atDirectives.description: EXSA Layer 5 — 50 plug-and-play BEM components. Each is one CSS file.

properties.name: --color-bg-secondary
properties.description: Secondary background (cards, inputs, hover states). Default: #e9e9e9

properties.name: --color-text-secondary
properties.description: Secondary/muted text (captions, helpers, disabled). Default: #757575 — WCAG AA on white

properties.name: --color-link
properties.description: Link color and primary accent. Default: #118bee

properties.name: --color-accent
properties.description: Subtle blue background tint (code, even rows). Default: #118bee15

properties.name: --color-success
properties.description: Success state color (green). Used by buttons, badge, alert, toast, form-validation. Default: #16a34a

properties.name: --color-danger
properties.description: Danger/error state color (red). Used by buttons, badge, alert, toast, form-validation. Default: #dc2626

properties.name: --color-warning
properties.description: Warning state color (amber). Used by buttons, badge, alert. Default: #d97706

properties.name: --color-button-text
properties.description: Button text color (defined by themes). Fallback: #fff

properties.name: --color-error
properties.description: Error text color for form helpers. Fallback: #dc2626

properties.name: --border-radius
properties.description: Border radius for cards, buttons, inputs. Default: 5px

properties.name: --justify-important
properties.description: Text alignment for centered content. Default: center

properties.name: --justify-normal
properties.description: Text alignment for body/forms. Default: start (auto-flips in RTL)
